creator: mickey242@gmx.net
text:
Squid segfaults when a 'cache_dir' of type 'aufs' is configured in squid.conf.

i.E.:

cache_dir aufs /var/squid/cache 500 16 256

Same configuration with 'aufs' changed to 'ufs' works without a problem.

How-To-Repeat: Set up squid to use a cache directory of type 'aufs' and try to start squid.
